LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF FELITA SAMPLE'S MOTION FOR DEFAULT JUDGMENT CCP 585-587-5 IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE TO BEING RE-FILED. THE MOVING PARTY FAILED TO PROVIDE COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING PAPERS IN COMPLIANCE WITH SAN FRANCISCO LOCAL RULE 2.6B. MOREOVER, DEFAULT JUDGMENT PROVE-UP HEARINGS ARE NOT HEARD IN DEPARTMENT 302. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; NOT REPORTED

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-08-2012 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss Complaint
Off Calendar May-31-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. JOSE ANTHONY MONTALVO OF THE LAW OFFICES OF CESARI, WERNER AND MORIARTY, TEL. NO. 391-1113 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT CHERYL FIELDS' Motion To Dismiss Complaint with Prejudice is Granted. No opposition filed. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Harold Kahn; Not reported. = (302/HEK)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-24-2012 Set For Order To Show Cause On Jun-18-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-21-2012 Continued To May-04-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610

Motion For Default Judgment Ccp 585-587-5
Off Calendar Feb-15-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Jose Anthony Montalvo, Esq., of Cesari, Werner and Moriarty, Tel. 415.391.113 x11, appearing for Defendant and opposing party.

No other appearance. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF FELITA SAMPLE's Motion For Default Judgment Ccp 585-587-5 is Denied without prejudice to being re-filed. The moving party failed to provide courtesy copies of the moving papers in compliance with San Francisco Local Rule 2.6B. Moreover, default judgment prove-up hearings are not heard in Department 302. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Harold Kahn; Not reported

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-05-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT CHERYL FIELDS'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT.
Appearances: Paul N. Cesari of the Law Offices of Cesari Werner and Moriarty (391.1113) for defendant and moving party; no other appearances.
The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: sustained with ten days leave to amend. No opposition was filed. Order signed. (302/HEK) Judge: Harold Kahn; Not reported

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-05-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT CHERYL FIELDS' MOTION TO STRIKE PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM FOR PUNITIVE DAMAGES.
Appearances: Paul N. Cesari of the Law Offices of Cesari Werner and Moriarty (391.1113) for defendant and moving party; no other appearances.
The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: granted with ten days leave to amend. No opposition was filed. Order signed. (302/HEK) Judge: Harold Kahn; Not reported
